# SecAFPServerSignature

**Type Alias**

Represents a 16-byte Apple File Protocol server signature block.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias SecAFPServerSignature = (UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8, UInt8)
```

## Discussion



This type represents a 16-byte Apple File Protocol server signature block. You can use a value of this type with the keychain item attribute constant [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAttr/signatureItemAttr] to specify an Apple File Protocol server signature.
title: SecAFPServerSignature
